_comment: Hand-derived (implementation-plan.md fixtures rule, WP-11), same envelope assumption as steps.json (see its _comment). Body Fat is a Sample (S) type per base-knowledge.md §3; value key `body_fat.percentage` (field name assumed). Same 0...100 percentage assumption as oxygen-saturation.json -- SyncKit's TypeMapper converts to HealthKit's required 0...1 fraction (base-knowledge.md §5: 'Body Fat ... fraction in HK'). Mirrored in SyncKit's TypeMapperFixtures.bodyFatPoint().
